allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: escape domain regex in scope filtering to prevent false matches

Dots in domain names were not escaped before use in grep regex,
causing example.com to match exampleXcom, evil-example.com, etc.
Also strips [toolname] prefixes from subdomain dedup in subdomains.sh.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(for tool in curl jq subfinder assetfinder findomain amass dig dnsx dnsgen alterx gotator httpx naabu waybackurls waymore gau katana gospider uro gf unfurl ffuf backupfinder)
